title: Lightning Round ⚡
description: A rapid-fire speed test on Advanced OOP and Exceptions. Think fast!

questions.question: Which keyword makes a variable shared across all object instances?
questions.explanation: Static attaches the variable to the Class Blueprint itself.

questions.question: What is it called when a child class replaces a parent's method with its own version?
questions.explanation: Overriding allows custom behavior for inherited methods.

questions.question: How do you access a specific object's attributes?
questions.explanation: Dot notation is the standard way.

questions.question: What blocks code execution from instantly crashing during an Error?
questions.explanation: Try catches the explosion before it kills the app.

questions.question: Inside a constructor, what clarifies that `name` refers to the object's attribute, not the incoming parameter?
questions.explanation: The `this` keyword refers to the current executing instance.

questions.question: If you throw an exception manually, what keyword do you use?
questions.explanation: The `throw` keyword followed by a new Exception object.

questions.question: Which block is STRICTLY guaranteed to run after a Try/Catch?
questions.explanation: The finally block runs no matter what.

questions.question: What visibility modifier locks a variable entirely inside its own class?
